data: Document root element; structural container only, carries no controlled vocabulary to map.
link_source: External-links plumbing; identifies the provider of an outbound link, not AOP semantic content.
references: Bibliographic citation lists with free-text references; no controlled vocabulary to map to RDF.
url: External-links plumbing; raw href string for an outbound link, not AOP semantic content.
url_link: External-links plumbing; display wrapper around an outbound link, not AOP semantic content.
value: Untyped weight-of-evidence child carried inside already-mapped parent elements; no standalone semantics.
